title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
